message:
test(proptest): expand backpressure_severity (20→33), reranker (20→31) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

backpressure_severity: SeverityConfig Clone/Debug/pretty serde,
ThrottleActions Debug/Clone/determinism, detection_skip monotonicity,
high load severity convergence, smoothed_ratio boundedness, severity-
to-actions integration.

reranker: ScoredDoc deep clone independence, Debug struct name, max
u64 id, negative score preservation, special chars in text,
RerankError Debug variant names, Display length, identical input
identical output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
